login.title: Sign in
login.description: Sign in with your email and password.
login.trialBannerTitle: Your account is a trial account.
login.trialBannerBody: Please use email forwarding to process orders. Web login is not available during the trial period.
login.trialBannerHint: Forward order emails to your assigned address.

errors.account_inactive: Your account is deactivated. Please contact your administrator.
errors.tenant_inactive: Your tenant is deactivated. Please contact platform support.
errors.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.invite_link_expired: Your invitation link has expired. Please contact your administrator to request a new invitation.
errors.invalid_invite_link: The invitation link is invalid. Please contact your administrator to request a new invitation.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If an account with the email address {email} exists, you will shortly receive an email with a link to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now sign in with your new password.

errors.sessionFailed: Session could not be established. Please request a new link.
errors.invalidLink: Invalid reset link. Please request a new link.

acceptInvite.title: Accept invitation
acceptInvite.descriptionWithTenant: You have been invited to {tenant}. Set your password to activate your account.
acceptInvite.descriptionPlain: Set your password to activate your account.
acceptInvite.successDescription: Your account has been set up successfully. You will be redirected to the dashboard...

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
errors.sessionFailed: Session could not be established. Please request a new invitation.
errors.invalidLink: Invalid invitation link. Please request a new invitation.
errors.noSession: No valid session. Please use the link from your invitation email.
errors.accountSetupFailed: Account could not be set up. Please try again.
errors.linkExpired: Your invitation link has expired. Please contact your administrator to request a new invitation.

empty.title: No orders yet
empty.description: Upload your first order or forward an email.

list.emptyNoOrdersDescription: Upload your first order to start automatic extraction.
list.noResultsFiltered: No orders found for the active filters. Try adjusting the filters.
list.ordersTotalCount: {count, plural, one {# order total} other {# orders total}}

upload2.dropzoneAriaLabel: Drop files here or click to select
upload2.dropzoneIdle: Drag files here or click to select
upload2.duplicateSessionWarning: This file has already been added in this session
upload2.duplicateServerWarning: This file was already uploaded on {date}

delete.title: Permanently delete order?
delete.intro: You are about to delete the order <name>{filename}</name>.
delete.consequencesSingle: This order and all associated files (1 file) will be permanently deleted.
delete.consequencesMultiple: This order and all associated files ({count} files) will be permanently deleted.
delete.errorConnection: Connection error while deleting the order.

extractionStatus.pendingTooltip: Extraction is waiting to be processed.
extractionStatus.processingTooltip: AI extraction in progress. Please wait...
extractionStatus.extractedTooltip: Order data has been successfully extracted.

tenantLanguage.title: Language / Sprache
tenantLanguage.description: Default UI language for all users of this tenant. Individual users can override this preference.
tenantLanguage.helperAdmin: This setting applies to all users of your tenant, unless they have chosen a personal language.
tenantLanguage.helperNonAdmin: Only administrators can change this setting.
tenantLanguage.loadConnectionError: Connection error while loading the language.
tenantLanguage.saveSuccess: Language saved. The change takes effect on the next navigation.
tenantLanguage.saveConnectionError: Connection error while saving the language.

userLanguage.title: Language / Sprache
userLanguage.description: Personal UI language. Your setting overrides your tenant's default language.
userLanguage.helper: Choose "Use company setting" to follow your tenant's language.
userLanguage.loadConnectionError: Connection error while loading the language.
userLanguage.saveSuccess: Language saved. The change takes effect on the next navigation.
userLanguage.saveConnectionError: Connection error while saving the language.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeBack: Welcome back, {name}. Here is an overview of your workspace.
dashboard.welcomeBackNoName: Welcome back. Here is an overview of your workspace.

recentOrders.title: Recent Orders
recentOrders.description: Your latest orders and their status.
recentOrders.loadErrorRefresh: Orders could not be loaded. Please refresh the page.
recentOrders.emptyDescription: No orders yet. Upload your first order.

tenantContext.emptyDescription: Please select a tenant first by clicking the logo in the top navigation.

errors.auth_callback_failed: The sign-in link has expired or is invalid. Please request a new link.
errors.wrong_tenant: Access not allowed. Please contact your administrator.
errors.account_inactive: Your account is deactivated. Please contact your administrator.
errors.salesforce_not_configured: Access not allowed. Please contact your administrator.
errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.

login.sentDescription: If an account with this email address exists, we have sent you a sign-in link.
login.sentHint: Check your inbox and click the link to sign in. The link is valid for a few minutes.
login.greetingReturning: Hello {name}, welcome to the {tenant} ordering platform.
login.description: We will send you a sign-in link by email.

search.emptyCatalogDescription: Your article catalog is still empty. Please contact your administrator.
search.title: Place an order
search.subtitle: Enter article number, reference number, or search term
search.initialPrompt: Enter a search term to find articles.

basket.emptyDescription: Search for articles and add them to your basket.
basket.title: Basket
basket.summary: {lineItemCount, plural, one {# article} other {# articles}}, {itemCount, plural, one {# unit} other {# units}} total
basket.clearDescription: All {count} items will be removed from your basket. This action cannot be undone.

dealer.title: Select customer
dealer.subtitleWithCustomers: Search by customer number or customer name.

delivery.title: Delivery & notes
delivery.subtitle: Optional: alternate delivery address and notes for the order.
delivery.alternateAddressHint: Only specify if delivery should not go to the customer address.

confirm.title: Review order
confirm.subtitle: Please review your order and submit it.
confirm.missingCustomer: Customer information is missing. Please go back to step 1.
confirm.successDescription: Your order has been submitted successfully and is now being processed.
confirm.removeDescription: "{name}" will be removed from the order.

history.title: My orders
history.emptyDescription: You have not placed any orders yet. Start your first order.
history.lineItemCount: {count, plural, one {# line item} other {# line items}}

detail.networkError: Network error while loading the order.
detail.title: Order details
detail.noArticleNumbers: No article numbers in this order. Reorder not possible.
detail.allUnavailable: None of the articles are still available in the catalog. Reorder not possible.
detail.noneAdded: No articles could be added to the basket.
detail.unavailableSummary: {count, plural, one {# article is} other {# articles are}} no longer available in the catalog and will not be added to the basket:
